---
title: "Pine forest canopy modulates shrub–oak seedling interactions depending on shrub functional identity"
subtitle: "My poster - 68th IAVS Annual Symposium - Gijón, Spain"
format: html
---

[👆 Save it!](poster_v4.png){download="poster_v4.png" .btn .btn-secondary}

[![](poster_v4.png)](poster_v4.png)
